| [[mistakes/catboost-cpu-timeout]] | catboost, runtime, kaggle, timeout | active | **What happened:** CatBoost multi-class classification with ~157 features, 4-fold CV. Each fold took ~3 hours on Kaggle CPU. 4 folds × 3h = 12h just for CatBoos |
